free_text: Study of stripping to levels of 21Ne
20Ne gas target with enrichment of 99% enclosed in
Havar cell with diameter of 2.0 cm at a pressure of
2.0 atm
Outgoing particles were detected by four
counter telescopes, arranged symetrically in pairs
about the beam axis. No further information about
the detectors given
Compiled by S.H.
